page_metadata.biotools__summary: A software package,  to detect germline copy number variations in SNP array data. Currently, SegCNV supports Illumina 550K and 610K genotyping platforms.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A software package,  to detect germline copy number variations in SNP array data. Currently, SegCNV supports Illumina 550K and 610K genotyping platforms.
